title: [MTR3] British Rail Train Resources Pack
description: This resource pack adds some British Rail trains to Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
body:
# **Overview**
![class 800 and mark 5a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41fe8bed22e6a59ccef87320f79050324a139f10.jpeg)
This is an MTR3 backported version for **[MTR4] British Rail Class 800 Series**, **[MTR4] Mark5a 'Nova 3' Set** and 
**[MTR4] British Rail Class 68** by vitor2005 and szandorthe13th.

## Precautions:
MTR3.2.2 and ANTE/NTE0.4.0+ required.

## **Class 800 in Minecraft (MTR Mod)**
This resource pack adds the Hitachi Class 800 to Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod. The model was created by cw_315 for Transport Fever 2 and ported to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2025 then backported to MTR3 by OwenCheng10. It is compatible with MTR3.

Included Liveries:
- TransPennine Express
- Avanti West Coast

## **Class 68 and Mark 5A in Minecraft (MTR Mod)**
This resource pack adds the Class 68 and BR Mark 5A into Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. The original model was made by cw_315 for Transport Fever 2 and was ported to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2025 then backported to MTR3 by OwenCheng10. It is compatible with MTR3.

Included Liveries:
- TransPennine Express (Nova 3)

### Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Hitachi Rail, LNER, GWR, TransPennine Express, Avanti West Coast, Virgin Trains, Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, or cw_315
